reason: INVARIANT #1 violation — deepdive/author_episode briefs are forbidden. All podcast output must be series_episode format. recommendation: Disable the legacy daily author/deepdive fallback in main.py. On dates with no pending series candidate, queue an office_primer for an upcoming ballot decision or simply skip. As of 2026-05-23, today's scheduled candidate Sunil Dasgupta is fully done (all 4 eps aired 2026-05-08) and the next pending candidate is Dana Gassaway on 2026-05-31 — the system should be silent for the week, not invent deepdives.
